title: Show telemetry summary in bead list and detail panels
description:
Telemetry data is now captured in bead.metadata.telemetry but not visible in the TUI. Add telemetry visibility in two places:

1) BEAD LIST PANEL: Append a compact telemetry badge after the status tag for beads that have telemetry data. Format: [$<cost>, <duration>] e.g. '[$0.32, 2:55]'. Cost should show 2 decimal places. Duration should be formatted as m:ss (minutes:seconds). If telemetry is missing, show nothing extra. This applies to render_tree_panel() where each row is rendered.

2) DETAIL PANEL: Add a Telemetry section to format_detail_panel() showing key metrics when bead.metadata.telemetry exists: cost_usd, duration (formatted as m:ss), num_turns, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, prompt_chars, and session_id. If telemetry_history exists with multiple attempts, show the count and total cost across attempts.
acceptance_criteria: Bead list rows show compact telemetry badge [$cost, m:ss] when telemetry exists
Detail panel shows a Telemetry section with key metrics
Beads without telemetry show no telemetry info
Duration is formatted as m:ss not raw milliseconds
Cost shows 2 decimal places with dollar sign
